title: Rebuild AyurGlow Secrets homepage with new content structure and enhanced blog post features

requirements.text: Update the homepage hero section to display: headline 'Welcome to AyurGlow Secrets', subheading 'Discover time-tested Ayurvedic remedies for overall health, radiant skin, and strong, healthy hair. We bring you natural, chemical-free solutions rooted in ancient Indian wisdom and backed by modern understanding.'
acceptanceCriteria: Hero section displays the exact headline and subheading text provided
Hero section maintains visual prominence on the homepage

requirements.text: Add a 'What We Offer' section to the homepage displaying four key offerings: '🌿 Natural Ayurvedic Health Remedies', '💆 Skin Care Tips for Natural Glow', '💇 Hair Fall & Hair Growth Treatments', '🧘 Holistic Lifestyle & Wellness Advice'

quotes: 💆 Skin Care Tips for Natural Glow

acceptanceCriteria: Section displays all four offerings with their emoji icons
Offerings are presented in a visually organized manner

requirements.text: Add a 'Why AyurGlow Secrets?' section to the homepage highlighting: '100% natural & Ayurvedic approach', 'Simple home remedies', 'Safe, affordable, and effective', 'Suitable for all age groups'
acceptanceCriteria: Section displays all four benefits clearly
Visual styling emphasizes trustworthiness and natural wellness

requirements.text: Update the About page content to match the provided About Us text: 'AyurGlow Secrets is a wellness platform dedicated to sharing the healing power of Ayurveda for a healthier life, glowing skin, and stronger hair. Inspired by ancient Ayurvedic texts and traditional Indian home remedies, our goal is to help people adopt natural solutions over chemical-based treatments. We believe true beauty and health begin from within. Through balanced nutrition, herbal remedies, and mindful living, Ayurveda offers sustainable healing without side effects. Our content is carefully researched and simplified to help you easily follow Ayurvedic practices in your daily life.'

quotes: AyurGlow Secrets is a wellness platform
We believe true beauty and health begin from within

acceptanceCriteria: About page displays the complete provided text
Content maintains the Ayurvedic wellness tone and philosophy

requirements.text: Replace the existing site logo with the uploaded 'website logo.png' throughout the application (navigation header and footer)

quotes: use the share logo for the website

acceptanceCriteria: Uploaded logo displays in the navigation header
Logo maintains proper dimensions and quality
Logo is clickable and links to homepage

requirements.text: Add capability to upload and insert images at the beginning of blog post content in the blog post editor (CreateBlogPostPage and EditBlogPostPage)

quotes: please make sure I can upload image at the beginning and middle of my blog post

acceptanceCriteria: Users can upload an image before the main content starts
Image displays properly in the blog post editor
Image persists when post is saved and published

requirements.text: Add capability to upload and insert images in the middle of blog post content within the ReactQuill rich text editor (CreateBlogPostPage and EditBlogPostPage)

quotes: please make sure I can upload image at the beginning and middle of my blog post

acceptanceCriteria: Users can insert images anywhere within the blog post content
Image upload interface is accessible from the rich text editor toolbar
Inserted images display correctly in both editor and published view

requirements.text: Ensure the comment section displays at the end of each blog post detail page with the heading 'Share Your Comment' or similar

quotes: also should have share your comment at the end of each blog post

acceptanceCriteria: Comment section appears at the bottom of blog post detail pages
Section has a clear heading encouraging user comments
Users can add and view comments

requirements.text: Apply visual design inspiration from https://naturalremedytips.com/ for layout structure, card styling, typography hierarchy, and natural wellness aesthetic while ensuring all content and functionality remains unique to AyurGlow Secrets

quotes: take the idea from the below URL but do not copy content from the URL

acceptanceCriteria: Site adopts a clean, wellness-focused visual design similar in style to the reference URL
Layout patterns support easy content discovery
Design feels cohesive with Ayurvedic wellness branding
No content is copied from the reference site

constraints: Do not copy any content from https://naturalremedytips.com/ - only use it for visual design inspiration
Preserve existing backend blog post and comment functionality
Maintain the three main category pages: Health Remedies, Skin Care, Hair Care with their existing subcategory structure
nonGoals: Creating new remedy content pages beyond what already exists
Changing the backend data model for blog posts or comments
Implementing social media sharing buttons (not explicitly requested)
Adding newsletter subscription functionality (not in scope for this rebuild)
